headline: SLB (SLB) Stock After Recent Pullback Could The Valuation Gap Be An Opportunity
summary: If you are wondering whether SLB stock still offers value at its recent levels, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying about the company. The share price closed at US$48.09, with returns that declined 14.1% over the last week and 15.3% over the last month, while still sitting up 19.6% year to date and 37.8% over the past year. These moves come alongside ongoing interest in energy services stocks and continued attention on how companies like SLB may be positioned...

headline: SLB (SLB) Stock Could Be 21.7% Undervalued After Digital Marketplace Launch
summary: SLB (SLB) has drawn fresh investor attention after launching the SLB Digital Marketplace, a platform that lets energy companies find and deploy AI agents and digital tools directly into existing operations. See our latest analysis for SLB. Despite the fanfare around the SLB Digital Marketplace, SLB’s recent share price performance has cooled, with the stock falling 4.45% in the latest session and recording a 7 day share price return of 14.12% and a 30 day share price return of 15.29%.
